name: Teriyaki Chicken and Cucumbers
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken in a plastic bag set in a shallow dish.
2. For marinade, stir together teriyaki sauce, sesame oil, gingerroot, garlic, and 1/2 teaspoon sugar in a small bowl.
3. Pour the marinade over the chicken in the bag. Seal the bag.
4. Marinate the chicken in the refrigerator for 30 minutes, turning the bag occasionally.
5. Drain the chicken, discarding the marinade.
6. Meanwhile, combine cucumbers, vinegar, 1 1/2 teaspoons sugar, salt, and crushed red pepper in a medium bowl. Cover and chill until serving time.
7. In a large nonstick skillet, cook the chicken in hot oil over medium heat for 10-12 minutes, turning once or until no longer pink. Remove and cut into bite-size strips.
8. To serve, arrange cucumbers on a plate. Top with chicken. Garnish with red peppers if desired.
